Build a Covariate-Adjusted Null Distribution

Source: R/permutation_searchlight.R
build_adjusted_null.Rd

Bins null metric values by a covariate (e.g., number of features per center) so that per-voxel p-values can be computed relative to a matched null.

Usage

build_adjusted_null(
  null_values,
  covariates,
  n_bins = 5L,
  method = c("adjusted", "global")
)

Arguments

null_values

Numeric vector of null metric values from permutation runs.

covariates

A data.frame with an nfeatures column (same length as null_values).

n_bins

Integer >= 2. Number of quantile bins.

method

Character. "adjusted" (default) uses covariate bins; "global" places all values in one bin.

Value

An S3 object of class "adjusted_null".
